query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME = 'deletedAt' AND TABLE_NAME IN ('obras','sectors','job_functions','companies','company_bank_accounts','processos_trabalhistas','dixi_devices');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME = 'deletedAt' AND TABLE_NAME IN ('obras','sectors','job_functions','companies','company_bank_accounts','processos_trabalhistas','dixi_devices');
